---
title: "CMAR Coastal Monitoring Program Highlights"
format: 
  dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    theme: custom.scss
server: shiny
---

```{r}
#| context: setup
#| include: false

library(bsicons)
library(bslib)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(here)
library(plotly)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(shiny)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)

theme_set(theme_light())

dat_all <- readRDS(here("data/historical_access.RDS"))

pal <- c("#063E4D", "#62AECA")

```

# Filters {.sidebar width=15% height=100%}

```{r}
w <- '95%'

selectInput(
  "data_branch", "Select Data Branch", 
  choices = unique(dat_all$program_branch),
  selected = "Water Quality"
)

selectInput(
  "user_segment", "Select User", 
  choices = unique(dat_all$user_segment),
  selected = "anonymous"
)

selectInput(
  "access_type", "Select Access", 
  choices = unique(dat_all$access_type),
  selected = "download"
)

selectInput(
  "data_product", "Select Data Product", 
  choices = unique(dat_all$data_product),
  selected = "dataset"
)

```

# Interactions

## 
```{r}
plotlyOutput("fig1")
```

##

### {height=70%}
```{r}
plotlyOutput("fig2")
```

###

::: {.card padding=0px}
```{r}
bslib::value_box(
  title = "Total Number of Views:",
  showcase = bs_icon("eye"),
  value = "Test for Now",
  theme = value_box_theme(bg = "#62AECA", fg = "#063E4D")
)
```
:::


```{r}
#| context: server

dat <- reactive({
  dat <- dat_all %>% 
    filter(
      program_branch == input$data_branch,
      user_segment == input$user_segment,
      access_type == input$access_type,
      data_product == input$data_product
    ) 

  return(dat)
})

output$fig1 <- renderPlotly({
  
  plot_title <- paste0(
    "Total Number of ",
    input$data_branch, " ",
    input$data_product, "\n", 
    input$access_type, "s by ",
    input$user_segment, " users"
  )
  
  dat_plot <- dat() %>% 
    group_by(asset_name) %>% 
    summarise(n = sum(value)) %>% 
    ungroup()
  
  p <- ggplot(dat_plot, aes(n, asset_name)) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge", col = "grey20", fill = pal[1]) +
    scale_y_discrete(limits = rev) +
    scale_x_continuous("Total Number", expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +
    labs(title = plot_title) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank()
    )
  ggplotly(p)
})


output$fig2 <- renderPlotly({
  plot_title <- paste0(
    "Cumulative number of ",
    input$data_branch, " ",
    input$data_product, "\n", 
    input$access_type, "s by ",
    input$user_segment, " users"
  )
  
  
  dat_plot <- dat() %>%
    arrange(timestamp_ns) %>% 
    group_by(asset_name) %>%
    mutate(n = cumsum(value)) %>% 
    ungroup()
  
  get_pal <- colorRampPalette(c("#063E4D", "#62AECA", "#FFD118"))
  pal <- get_pal(length(unique(dat_plot$asset_name)))
  
  p <- ggplot(
    dat_plot, aes(timestamp_ns, n, col = asset_name, group = asset_name)
  ) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    scale_y_continuous("Cumulative Number") +
    scale_colour_manual("Asset", values = pal) +
    labs(title = plot_title) +
    theme(
      axis.title.x = element_blank()
    )
  
  ggplotly(p)
})

```
